name.description: Human-readable name of the entity — the shortest possible label uniquely identifying it, without parenthetical annotations or disambiguation qualifiers (e.g. 'Struktur Notiz' not 'Struktur Notiz (MOC)')

entityType.description: Category: person / organization / project / product / tool / place / work / dataset / event / system

description.description: 1-2 sentence description of who/what this entity is

sourceContext.description: Exact quote or context from the source that mentions this entity

name.description: Human-readable name of the concept — the shortest possible label uniquely identifying it, without parenthetical annotations or disambiguation qualifiers (e.g. 'Struktur Notiz' not 'Struktur Notiz (MOC)')

domain.description: Domain or field the concept belongs to (e.g. 'philosophy/psychology')

sourceContext.description: Exact quote or context from the source that discusses this concept
